title: Nursery Rhyme. CC. Riddles.
content:
Twelve pears hanging high,
        Twelve knights riding by;
        Each knight took a pear,
        And yet left eleven there!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CC. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
